name: BioEmu
description: Approximate the equilibrium distribution of structures for a protein monomer, given its amino acid sequence.. Samples protein conformations with relative free energy errors around 1 kcal/mol, as validated against millisecond-timescale MD simulation and experimentally-measured protein stabilities.
capabilities: Approximate the equilibrium distribution of structures for a protein monomer, given its amino acid sequence.
Samples protein conformations with relative free energy errors around 1 kcal/mol, as validated against millisecond-timescale MD simulation and experimentally-measured protein stabilities

sequence.description: Protein monomer amino acid sequence for equilibrium conformational sampling

num_samples.description: Number of conformational samples to generate
